                                <button data-size="32" data-variant="default" data-has-error="false" id="«r9d»" aria-invalid="false" type="button" aria-haspopup="dialog" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="radix-«r9a»" data-state="closed" style={{display: "flex", position: "static", width: "376px", height: "32px", paddingRight: "8px", paddingLeft: "8px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "hidden", flexFlow: "row", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", gap: "12px", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter", fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "500", lineHeight: "20px", textAlign: "center", letterSpacing: "-0.14px", color: "rgb(36, 37, 41)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderWidth: "1px", borderStyle: "solid", borderColor: "rgb(238, 239, 241)", borderRadius: "8px", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>

                              </div>
                            </div>
                            <div style={{display: "flex", position: "static", width: "376px", height: "52px", boxSizing: "border-box", overflow: "visible", flexFlow: "column", justifyContent: "flex-start", alignItems: "flex-start", gap: "4px", flexGrow: "0", flexShrink: "1", fontFamily: "Inter, sans-serif", fontSize: "10px", fontWeight: "400", lineHeight: "15px", textAlign: "start", color: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", textOverflow: "clip", backgroundColor: "rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)", backgroundPosition: "0% 0%", backgroundRepeat: "repeat", borderColor: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", opacity: "1", visibility: "visible", fill: "rgb(0, 0, 0)", strokeWidth: "1px"}}>

                              </div>
